events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 79th to the man behind some of rock's most iconic riffs! Brian May, still rocking stages and inspiring generations.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: 83 years young and still the most electrifying man in rock and roll. Happy Birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger!

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV hit the airwaves with that iconic first video. Did video really kill the radio star? We think not!

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, kicking off the Britpop era.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music and Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, kicked off on August 15, 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. An unforgettable cultural moment.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, would have been 91
events.blurb: August 16th marks 49 years since the passing of Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, 49 years on. His music and legacy continue to inspire.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, would have been 55
events.blurb: September 13th marks 30 years since the death of hip-hop icon Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, we lost a voice that changed hip-hop forever. Remembering Tupac Shakur, his music and his message live on.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, would have been 84
events.blurb: September 18th marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: 56 years ago, the world lost a true innovator. Remembering Jimi Hendrix, whose revolutionary guitar work still echoes today.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Crossing
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous images in music history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the incomparable Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon with a voice that's as powerful as ever.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless single 'Imagine' in the US on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon gave us 'Imagine', a song that continues to resonate with its message of peace and unity.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple launched the original iPod on November 10, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: 1000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed how we listen to music forever.

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is Global James Bond Day, celebrating the anniversary of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy Global James Bond Day! What's your favourite Bond film, gadget, or theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: October 9th marks what would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles legend, John Lennon.

angles.name: Remembering John
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian and actor, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: And Now For Something Completely Different
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the comedic genius, John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true British institution.

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album' 58 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: The White Album
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles dropped 'The White Album'. A sprawling, experimental masterpiece that still sparks debate and delight.
